creator: coco@executive-computing.de
text:
Created attachment 145516
redaxo-4.6.1.patch

- Update from 4.6 to 4.6.1
- Fix leftover file detection in pkg-deinstall.in

Upstream changelog (translated from the German version):

- Added new extension: ART_CONTENT
- Some minor cosmetic fixes
- rex_navigation::getBreadcrumb now also returns the current article.
- image_manager: png transparencies no longer get lost.
- image_manager: if the cached image is not available, it'll get recalculated.
- image_manager: script will no longer be terminated, if finfo classes do not exist.
- setup/import_export: Transfering the Demo into the data folder works now.
- Installer: Ziping / unzipping did not work in some environments. This has been fixed.
